title: Justicia Divina
overview: Fernando is a humble young man who falls deeply in love with Camila, the beautiful daughter of Don Raymundo — a powerful trafficker known for his ruthless character and immense wealth.  Their love grows in secret, but when Don Raymundo discovers the relationship, his pride and fury explode. To him, Fernando is nothing more than a poor nobody unworthy of his daughter.  Blinded by rage and control, Don Raymundo hires a feared Kaibil and his deadly hitmen to track down Fernando and eliminate him.  What begins as forbidden love quickly turns into a desperate fight for survival — where love is challenged by power, violence, and the merciless rules of a criminal empire.
